description: Stylish and uber cool, these Tone-Ups flip flops from skechers add an extra bounce to your step. With a simple strappy design, these slippers are designed to activate your calf, thigh and buttock muscles. Look super stylish in these comfortable slippers all day long. Upper Synthetic straps on the forefoot and midfoot with a velvetty upper and padded fabric inner for abrasion-free comfort and style Midfoot strap has a buckle closure to offer a customised Fit Padded PU footbed for cushioned comfort Soft PU heel pad for comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole designed to create instability with every step and therefore activate underused muscles to maintain balance Balance pods that create slight and constant shifts in weight to offer a more intense workout with lesser stress shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
